name: Ancient Tunnel
description: The organic passage gives way abruptly to worked stone. The tunnel here is old — far older than the forest above. Faded murals line the walls.{{mural_desc}}
ambient: Dust shifts underfoot in long undisturbed layers.
The air is dry — unnaturally so after the beast above.

description_snippets.mural_desc: The first mural shows a lone warrior facing a vast serpent.

objects.name: mural
objects.description: A faded mural carved into the stone wall.

on_interact.look: A warrior stands before a towering wyrm. The blade in their hand is small — almost insignificant compared to the beast.
on_interact.read: There are no words. Only the image of defiance.
